description: Player reaches exactly 66 cattle heads → game ends. p0 collects [5,10,1]: cattleHeads(5)=2(%5) + cattleHeads(10)=3(%10) + cattleHeads(1)=1(other) = 6 penalty → 60+6=66. p1 collects [1,2]: 1+1=2 → 20+2=22.
Player exceeds 66 cattle heads → game ends. p0 collects [55]: cattleHeads(55)=7(special) → 60+7=67. p1 collects [3]: cattleHeads(3)=1(other) → 30+1=31.

Two players hit ≥66 in same round → game ends, lowest wins. p0 collects [11,2]: cattleHeads(11)=5(%11) + cattleHeads(2)=1(other) = 6 → 60+6=66. p1 collects [10]: cattleHeads(10)=3(%10) → 63+3=66. p2 collects [4]: cattleHeads(4)=1(other) → 10+1=11.

Every player ≥66 → game ends, lowest still wins. p0 collects [20,7]: cattleHeads(20)=3(%10) + cattleHeads(7)=1(other) = 4 → 62+4=66. p1 collects [3]: cattleHeads(3)=1(other) → 70+1=71. p2 collects [22]: cattleHeads(22)=5(%11) → 65+5=70.
No player ≥66 → game continues. p0 collects [10,5]: cattleHeads(10)=3(%10) + cattleHeads(5)=2(%5) = 5 → 50+5=55. p1 collects [1,2,3]: 1+1+1=3(all other) → 40+3=43.

Two players share lowest score → both win. p0 collects [11,2]: cattleHeads(11)=5(%11) + cattleHeads(2)=1(other) = 6 → 60+6=66. p1 collects [4]: cattleHeads(4)=1(other) → 30+1=31. p2 collects [6]: cattleHeads(6)=1(other) → 30+1=31.

Verifies score = sum of cattleHeads, NOT card face values. p0 collects [55,11,22]: cattleHeads(55)=7(special) + cattleHeads(11)=5(%11) + cattleHeads(22)=5(%11) = 17 (card sum=88, but penalty=17). p1 collects [99,98,97,96]: cattleHeads(99)=5(%11, 99=11×9) + cattleHeads(98)=1(other) + cattleHeads(97)=1(other) + cattleHeads(96)=1(other) = 8 (card sum=390, but penalty=8).
